# 3 Sprint Uygulama Plani

## Sprint-1 (Basladi)
- Safety state machine (E-Stop latch + manual reset + limit handling)
- SCPI reliability layer (timeout/retry/*OPC? pattern)
- pytest-qt smoke test setup

## Sprint-2
- Real driver adapter interfaces (USB/Ethernet controller, SCPI VNA, TTL I/O)
- Command queue + watchdog + structured alarms
- Acceptance test harness (position and scan KPI checks)

## Sprint-3
- Packaging hardening (signed build pipeline, setup QA)
- Operator UX polish, localization, audit logs
- ICD import wizard and mapping validator
